actions_suggested.operation: push (create si absent, update si present match par Code)
actions_suggested.batching: 1 call create_pages max 100 pages, sleep 350ms si > 1 call
actions_suggested.mapping: | Title | Code | Date | Module | Status | Source ref | -> proprietes Notion

actions_suggested.operation: push row par plan, parse frontmatter YAML
actions_suggested.mapping: title, slug, decision, status, phases_total, phases_done, effort, path -> proprietes
title extrait H2, date, duration, scope, commits, decisions ref, livraison, revelations

actions_suggested.source_fos: phases des plans actifs + elements 6-stricts + TodoWrite state
actions_suggested.operation: push rows Type=Phase (1 par phase), Type=Element (optionnel, 6 par phase), Type=Task (TodoWrite courant)
actions_suggested.mapping: Plan ref relation vers row Plans, Phase P1-PN, Element 1-6, Status Todo/In Progress/Done/Blocked, Priority, Module, Type

idempotence_rules: Match par Code pour Decisions (D-XXX-NN unique)
Si pas match -> create via notion-create-pages
Update Synced at timestamp a chaque sync

conflict_handling.rule: last-write-wins par champ (timestamp modified_at le plus recent gagne)

notes: Pattern honnete P-11 : bash ne peut invoquer MCP, Claude execute les actions suggerees.
Update .omc/product-config.json sync_state.last_push avec timestamp fin de sync.
P2 initial (2026-04-19) : 16 decisions + 1 plan + 5 sessions + 6 tasks phases deja pushes via MCP direct.
